sections.paragraph:
Original: רשׁע

Transliteration: resha‛

Phonetic: reh'-shah

BDB Definition:

  1. wrong, wickedness, guilt
    1. wickedness (as violence and crime against civil law)
    2. wickedness (of enemies)
    3. wickedness (in ethical relations)

Origin: from H7561

TWOT entry: 2222a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
